title: GUI's Perfected
description: A lovingly crafted sequel to Cutting Edge. Colorful, sharp and modern GUI's in line with the vanilla feel.
body:
**GUI's PERFECTED**

Welcome to the best GUI pack, no exceptions (unless you find an exception.) This pack overhauls everything from the hotbar to the menus to the pink shulker box.

This pack contains Optifine/OptiGUI dependent textures (not entirely required)

Video Showcase!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/qAvV6H1CEPY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Tables Lable](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf0a43369306963e3b37035f3494354a6c31f6a4.png)

![Tables](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/106764800ab95875fbe8543986230618ddbe2fdf.png)

Tables now reflect their block with vibrant new menus. The pack tastefully combines The sharp angles of Cutting Edge (my last GUI pack) with the rounded corners of the vanilla game. 

![Menu Lable](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96b4f49725e06fcf3f0d836a3f85c6a6e8cbd60d.png)

The menus buttons were a hard point of contention for me personally. I aimed to refresh things and clean up the ui while holding onto some minecraft charm. I genuinely don’t think they could’ve turned out better. If you want a little bonus add on, try an icon pack. While they don’t fit into the scope of this pack, they are a fun way to spice up the menus a little further.

![Menu Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e73dc30541cbdc8e56cd08a637f6fd7b3fec1ce_0.webp)

The font has received a massive overhaul as well. Credit to Epsilon751 for the resource pack I built off of to achieve this mix of blocky and sleek (kinda like the rest of the pack :D )

![Hotbar Lable](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76a89c0ad8765a9d2d9330785b1cb2dc7ce50cca.png)

I’m still in love with the meat shanks. The little bones left behind are just really cute.

![Hotbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dac4f03e8e7a111d1a34c15f533f6e7d3e64c1f4_0.webp)

These packs are inspired from A LOT of various packs I find floating around. As such, I have a long list of packs from which I've taken inspiration or otherwise found interesting. Most of my links are for planet minecraft, since I enjoy the community aspect and still find a lot of burried treasure there.

> Colorful containers - [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colourful-containers-gui](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colourful-containers-gui)

> Fany GUI - [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fancy-gui-overhaul](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fancy-gui-overhaul)

> Interface Update - [https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/interface-update/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/interface-update/)

> Interface Update Font - [https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/iu-font-pack/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/iu-font-pack/)

> Ensis's Better GUI - [https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/ensis-s-gui/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/ensis-s-gui/)

> Dark Coffee GUI - [https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/dark-coffe-gui/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/dark-coffe-gui/)

> XR's Remastered GUI - [https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/xr-s-remastered-gui/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/xr-s-remastered-gui/)

> GUI Nightsylized - [https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/gui-nightstylized/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/gui-nightstylized/)

> GUi - [https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/gui-5355406/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/gui-5355406/)

> Icons Reimagined - [https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/icons-reimaged/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/icons-reimaged/)

> Koncipet GUI - [https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/koncipet-ui/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/koncipet-ui/)

> GUI Revision - [https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/gui-revision/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/gui-revision/)

> Obarhaul - [https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/obarhaul-3-1-16/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/obarhaul-3-1-16/)

> Unique Dark - [https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/unique-dark/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/unique-dark/)

Most of the packs in this list have in some way contributed towards my final result. Lots of love to the many creators out there sharing their styles and ideas.

Let me know if you find any issues and I hope you enjoy the pack!
